summary: Iteration 233 testing completed successfully. All frontend track selection features for Now Spinning composer verified: 1) Native <select> dropdown appears when record has tracks (data-testid='spin-track-select'). 2) First option 'Select a track...' and last option '-- Manual Input --' confirmed. 3) Selecting '-- Manual Input --' shows text input (data-testid='spin-track-manual-input'). 4) 'Back to tracklist' link appears in manual mode (data-testid='spin-track-back-to-list'). 5) Loading state shows 'Fetching tracks... 🐝' while Discogs API fetches tracklist (data-testid='spin-track-loading'). 6) Helper text 'Tell the hive what you love about this record! 🐝' visible (data-testid='spin-caption-helper'). 7) Post button disabled until comment entered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Track selection features all working. Verified with records: 'Pizzicato V In The Audrey Hepburn Complex' (3 tracks from Discogs ID 1982896) and 'Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions' (17 tracks from Discogs ID 26809709). Loading state 'Fetching tracks... 🐝' visible during Discogs API call. Native <select> dropdown shows tracks with 'Select a track...' as first option and '-- Manual Input --' as last option. Manual input mode shows text input with placeholder 'Type the track name...' and 'Back to tracklist' link. Helper text disappears after entering caption. Post button enables only after caption entered.
